rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: CMD Launching Batch Script Stored on External Drive (Chromeloader)

rules.rule_text:
title: CMD Launching Batch Script Stored on External Drive (Chromeloader)
id: 79cd4f76-2df9-42e1-a957-34fb7ee5a3cc
status: experimental
description: Detects instances of CMD executing a batch stored on an externally-mounted
  drives, in turn spawning a tar extraction process.
references:
- https://blogs.vmware.com/security/2022/09/the-evolution-of-the-chromeloader-malware.html
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/07
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1553
- attack.t1553.005
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
    - \powershell.exe
    - \cmd.exe
    ParentCommandLine|contains|windash: /c
    ParentCommandLine|re: ^.*[D-Z]:\\.*\.(bat|cmdline).*$
  selection_child_proc:
    Image|endswith: \tar.exe
  selection_extract_options:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - -xvf
    - -xfv
    - -vxf
    - -vfx
    - -fxv
    - -fvx
  selection_output_options:
    CommandLine|contains: appdata\
  condition: all of selection*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
